description: Cut first-frame startup work by making the app show UI immediately, deferring service registration/model container creation off the initial `.task`, and lazily bootstrapping heavy MainView work after the first appearance.

Improve cold launch by making the first frame cheaper: instantiate `MainView` immediately behind the splash, remove startup logging/await churn from the initial path, and defer `MainView` bootstrap work until after first appearance so UI can render before heavy DI/SwiftData setup.

Reduce cold launch by removing startup debug I/O from the first-frame path, showing `MainView` immediately behind the splash, and deferring `MainView` bootstrap/model work until after first appearance so expensive service/view-model setup happens after UI is on screen.
Cut first-frame launch cost by removing synchronous startup logging/animation work and making `MainView` bootstrap lazy so heavy DI/SwiftData wiring happens after the initial UI is already visible.

Reduce cold launch by removing synchronous startup logging/animation overhead, making the root UI render immediately with a lightweight placeholder MainView, and deferring expensive MainView/bootstrap work until after the first frame.

Cut cold-launch cost by eliminating synchronous startup logging/animation overhead and rendering a much cheaper first frame, while deferring all nonessential registration/bootstrap work until after the initial UI is visible.

Make the very first frame cheaper by removing synchronous launch logging/animation work, simplifying the splash rendering, and deferring heavy MainView/bootstrap initialization off the initial onAppear path.

Make the first frame dramatically cheaper by stripping synchronous launch logging/animation overhead and replacing the splash’s expensive Canvas/gradient work with a static lightweight view while keeping all existing startup sequencing intact.

Reduce cold launch by removing synchronous launch-path logging/animation/canvas overhead and making the splash disappear immediately once the app is ready, while preserving startup sequencing and UI correctness.

Improve cold launch by removing synchronous launch-path logging and expensive splash rendering, and by making MainView’s first frame lightweight while deferring bootstrap/view-model construction until after the initial appearance.

reduce first-frame and early-launch main-thread work by stripping startup logging/animation overhead, simplifying splash rendering, and deferring MainView bootstrap/view-model creation until after the initial appearance.
